title: Bacrana (star)

|class=[[Star/Legends#Types of stars|G]]<ref>''[[Flashpoint! Brak Sector]]'' identifies Bacrana as being a yellow star. ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' specifies that yellow stars are class G.</ref>

'''Bacrana''' was the yellow primary [[Star/Legends|star]] of the [[Bacrana system/Legends|Bacrana system]].<ref name="FBS" />
